headlines.title: Mariners shut out by Rangers 3-0, manage just two hits
headlines.summary: Seattle managed just two hits — singles by Mitch Garver and Cole Young — and struck out 13 times in a 3-0 loss to the Texas Rangers. MacKenzie Gore allowed only one hit in five innings for Texas.

headlines.title: Mariners' top prospect Emerson injures foot; X-rays negative
headlines.summary: Mariners' top prospect Colt Emerson suffered a foot injury but X-rays came back negative, avoiding a more serious setback.

headlines.title: Robles (pec strain) goes on IL; Mariners select Connor Joe
headlines.summary: Victor Robles was placed on the injured list with a pec strain, prompting the Mariners to select Connor Joe to the active roster.

last_game.highlights: Seattle managed just two hits (singles by Mitch Garver and Cole Young) and struck out 13 times. MacKenzie Gore pitched five shutout innings for Texas.

teams.name: Seattle Seahawks

headlines.title: 2026 NFL Draft approaching: Seahawks hold pick No. 32
headlines.summary: Following their Super Bowl LX victory over the Patriots, the Seahawks will have the 32nd pick in the first round, and picks No. 64 and 96 in Rounds 2 and 3, respectively. The draft takes place April 23-25, 2026.

headlines.title: Mock Draft Roundup: Who Seahawks could pick at 32
headlines.summary: Analysts suggest the Seahawks may target Georgia Tech guard Keylan Rutledge ('the toughest dude in the draft') or UW Huskies running back Jonah Coleman as an under-the-radar prospect.

headlines.title: Seahawks have met with prospects R Mason Thomas, Keyron Crawford, and Keyshawn James-Newby
headlines.summary: The Seahawks have conducted pre-draft meetings with several prospects including edge rushers and defensive players who could be available at picks 32 or 64.

last_game.highlights: Seahawks won Super Bowl LX, securing their second championship in franchise history.

teams.note: Currently in offseason. 2026 NFL Draft begins April 23.

teams.name: Seattle Kraken

headlines.title: Kraken lose 5-2 to Wild, fall to brink of elimination
headlines.summary: The Minnesota Wild defeated the Kraken 5-2, extending Seattle's losing streak to six games (0-5-1). Joel Eriksson Ek had a goal and two assists for Minnesota. Brandon Montour and Adam Larsson scored for the Kraken.

headlines.title: Kraken President Ron Francis stepping down
headlines.summary: Kraken President Ron Francis is stepping down from his role with the organization.

headlines.title: Wild benefit from replay reviews in victory over Kraken
headlines.summary: The Minnesota Wild twice benefited from replay reviews in their 5-2 victory, including a goal that was allowed after review.

last_game.highlights: Brandon Montour and Adam Larsson scored for Seattle. Joey Daccord made 24 saves. Kraken have now lost six straight games and 10 of their past 11.

teams.note: Fan Appreciation Night presented by Amazon

headlines.title: 2026 MLS Regular Season schedule released
headlines.summary: The MLS regular season schedule was released November 20, 2025. The Sounders will play 34 matches — 17 at home and 17 away — primarily against the 14 other teams in the Western Conference.

headlines.title: Sounders to face Tigres UANL in Concacaf Champions Cup
headlines.summary: Seattle will host Tigres UANL in the 2nd Leg of the Concacaf Champions Cup on April 15 at Lumen Field.

last_game.highlights: Last updated match played April 4, 2026 per Wikipedia.

next_game.location: Home (Lumen Field) - Concacaf Champions Cup 2nd Leg

teams.name: Seattle Storm

headlines.title: Storm announces 2026 regular season schedule
headlines.summary: The Seattle Storm announced their 2026 regular season schedule. Seattle fans will have two opportunities to see the 2026 No. 1 draft pick and the Dallas Wings in Seattle on June 22 and September 23.

headlines.title: Storm to host defending champion Las Vegas Aces
headlines.summary: The Storm will host the defending WNBA champions, the Las Vegas Aces, on Thursday, September 17 at Climate Pledge Arena.

last_game.highlights: 2026 WNBA season has not yet begun.

teams.note: WNBA season typically runs May through September. 2026 schedule announced.
